title: sagraea sparsiflora
intro: Sagraea sparsiflora, also known as the Brazilian tea tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Sagraea sparsiflora has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and even acting as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of Sagraea sparsiflora are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
